title: Privacy Policy

sections.title: Data Controller
sections.content: Atlas Services is responsible for the processing of your personal data.

sections.title: Data collected
items: Identification: name, identity document (only for billing if applicable), email address, phone/WhatsApp.
Technical: IP address, device type, session cookies.

sections.title: Purposes
items: Publish your profile (making your name, phone and area public for direct client contact).
Manage accounts, process Premium payments and send relevant notifications.
Improve the security and functionality of the platform.

sections.title: Legal basis
sections.content: Explicit consent when publishing or subscribing, and compliance with applicable local personal data protection regulations in your country.

sections.title: Sharing
items: Public data (name, phone, area) is shown on your profile.
Payments: processed by certified payment gateways (we do not store card data).
We do not sell or share data for commercial purposes with third parties.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.content: You can access, rectify, cancel or block your data by writing to privacy@atlasservices.com or from your account settings.

sections.title: Security
sections.content: We use SSL encryption and appropriate technical measures. No system is 100% secure, but we protect your data to the fullest extent.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: Only essential session cookies to keep you logged in.

sections.title: Retention
sections.content: We retain data while your account is active and up to 12 months after its deletion (for legal obligations or dispute resolution). You can request early deletion.

footer: Your trust is important to us. Thank you for using Atlas Services.
